title: How Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian are adopting AI coding
summary: Engineering leaders from Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian discuss how they are adopting AI coding tools at scale, covering workflow changes, productivity measurement, and implementation strategies. The panelists share findings including that developers spend more time on non-coding tasks, small teams can compress roadmaps significantly with AI, and that measuring actual impact requires careful evaluation.
